ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Daniels in Propria Persona.

Mr. Daniels stated that he is not requesting independent powers in his amended petition, that his claim to intestacy is due to the attorney who assisted in drafting the will (Mr. Travis) who is deceased and that the other subscribing witness' name is illegible. The Amended Petition for Letters of Administration is granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
